title: Visualizing the Linear Span of Vectors
description: A diagram showing how the linear span is the set of all possible linear combinations of a given set of vectors, forming a subspace.
relationships: v₁ and v₂ are vectors starting from the origin
The plane S represents the span of {v₁, v₂}, containing all points reachable by a₁v₁ + a₂v₂
